_comment: Schema only. The REAL rules are private and live in sops (secrets/main.yaml, key firefox-router/rules), decrypted at runtime to /run/secrets/firefox-router/rules. First matching rule wins; unmatched URLs go to `default`. A glob with `/` matches `<host><path>` (e.g. github.com/org/*); a glob without `/` matches the host alone, so an apex needs a separate `*.` entry for subdomains.
